Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius wears a white sacred artist's robe.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius follows the Path of Black Flame and is eighteen years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon's full name is Wei Shi Lindon Arelius.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — The young man challenged Wei Shi Lindon Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius is an adopted member of an Arelius branch family and a member of the Blackflame Empire vassal state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius is of the Akura clan and a chosen of Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius is chosen of Akura Malice and representative of the prime Akura team.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius is Charity's selection for the tournament and reached the top sixteen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's full name is Lindon Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius is a pure madra Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon Arelius is in the fortress with Seishen Daji.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon Arelius possesses black dragon madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon Arelius's black dragon madra feels like a flame with an endless hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon Arelius is referred to as the Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon Arelius uses a green Thousand-Mile Cloud to fly.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon Arelius is a character in the story.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius wears the clothes of the Akura clan.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius is the Sage of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon Arelius is a potential hostage to force Yerin Arelius's cooperation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan Shen addresses Lindon as Wei Shi Lindon Arelius.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius is the Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius was a sacred artist who was corrupted by the power of the Silent King.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon Arelius is described as a lynchpin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius blazes with Northstrider's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Herald offered to send the group safely to Lindon Arelius.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Crusher was nearly destroyed by Lindon Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon Arelius is a Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon Arelius is a Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon Arelius has black-and-white eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon Arelius has one hand whiter than the other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Wei Shi Lindon Arelius is of the Blackflame Empire.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
